title: Campeón del barrio (Su última canción)
writer: José María Fernández Unsáin, Edgardo Obregón Mazón
actors: Fernando Soler, Javier Solís, Sonia López
plot: A young man eagerly prepares for triumph as boxer in a neighborhood gym with the firm intention of escaping poverty, being champion and to marry his girlfriend who sings in a nightclub,
